name: user-app
// targets: to see all targets run: nx show project user-app --web

options.command: VITE_E2E_COVERAGE=true VITE_API_BASE_URL_MODE=same-origin pnpm exec vite build --config apps/frontend/app/vite.config.mts && node packages/tooling/scripts/testing/frontend-browser-e2e-coverage.mjs --dist dist/apps/frontend/app --app-name user-app --contains "Sign in, register, and load your protected profile." --coverage-dir coverage/e2e/apps/frontend/app
